title: Terawulf (WULF) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text: TeraWulf has a Buy consensus rating as of May 11, 2026 based on 10 analysts. WULF has 13 Buy ratings, 0 Hold ratings, and 0 Sell ratings. The price targets vary with WULF's current price target at $26.75, though some sources report a median price target of $27.00. Targets range from a high of $37.00 to a low of $17.00, with a median of $21.25. Recent analyst upgrades in May 2026 include: Keefe Bruyette analyst Stephen Glagola raised the firm's price target to $33 from $25 with an Outperform rating; Needham raised to $28 from $22; Citizens raised to $32 from $22 with Outperform rating; Northland raised to $30 from $23.25 with Outperform rating. TeraWulf is transitioning from Bitcoin mining to AI compute services, reporting a $427 million net loss for Q1 2026, while AI revenue surged 117% to $21 million. Analysts are optimistic about the company's shift, with upgrades and a focus on high-performance computing driving future growth potential.
